call_tool: execute a tool call with retry, circuit breaker, and stuck resolution across MCP servers
call_tool_chain: execute a sequential chain of tool calls stopping on unrecoverable client errors
fan_out: execute multiple tool calls concurrently with a configurable concurrency limit across MCP servers
rank_tools_for_task: rank available MCP tools by relevance, reliability, and inertia for a given task description
get_session_summary: get a summary of an orchestration session including success rate, errors, and circuit states
